text.title: ADR Decay Detector Agent Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example end-to-end for kb-adr-decay-detector-agent — narrative trace plus the final artefact.

section.title: Narrative trace
section.p: Detector scans 27 ADRs → finds ADR 0007 says Postgres, code uses MongoDB → category=contradiction, evidence cites file+line → ticket opened in architecture review queue.

section.title: Final artefact
